TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Cihafayan, title = Cihafayan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cihafayan} }

S.FORM: alang Cihafayan ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Hong ring song, kwara sali buwan nya ga 101 buwan, 221 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 83% kyan ku 183 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 17% kyan ku 38 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 77%, Truku 1%, Tayan 2%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Cihafayan hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Cihafayan hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Cihafayan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Cihafayan hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Cihafayan hya' ga Cirakayan. tay 'zil na Cihafayan hya' ga Sariwsiw. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Cihafayan ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Hong ring song, kwara sali buwan nya ga 101 buwan, 221 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 83% kyan ku 183 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 17% kyan ku 38 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 77%, Truku 1%, Tayan 2%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Cihafayan hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Cihafayan hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Cihafayan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Cihafayan hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Cihafayan hya' ga Cirakayan. tay 'zil na Cihafayan hya' ga Sariwsiw. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč ¶~ ®ińßa*ajan …£a nija mki s~…ēku kariŇč keŇč atu ńßoŇč riŇč s~…ēoŇč, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a *** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku ** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, amis~…ē **%, truku *%, tajan *%, ő≤unun *%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *%. maki qu Ňčas~…ēal ő≤ziran, Ňčas~…ēal ps~…ēatu te…£ami ru pqniqan iju. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na ¶~ ®ińßa*ajan ńßja Ē …£a ő≤s~…ēiluŇč. taj Ēzil na ¶~ ®ińßa*ajan ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkjańßu Ē na ¶~ ®ińßa*ajan ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkraja Ē na ¶~ ®ińßa*ajan ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkjańßu Ē na ¶~ ®ińßa*ajan ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®irakajan. taj Ēzil na ¶~ ®ińßa*ajan ńßja Ē …£a s~…ēariws~…ēiw. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj maki * pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj. pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
